title: Chat input controls with clear and send functionality
purpose: Provides a reusable input component with clear and send buttons for chat interfaces, handling text input, sending messages, and clearing the input area.
module_context: Exports a React functional component InputControls that accepts props for send and clear callbacks, and manages local input state with textarea auto-resizing and keyboard handling.

steps.content: Initialize local state for the input value and reference to the textarea element.
Define a handler for sending messages that validates input, calls the send callback, clears the input, and resets textarea height.
Define a handler for keyboard input that triggers send on Enter key press without shift.
Define a handler for input changes that updates the local state and dynamically adjusts textarea height.
Define a handler for clear button clicks that calls the clear callback.
Render the clear button, textarea input field, and send button with appropriate styling and event handlers.
IF the input value is empty or only whitespace, return without taking action.
Call the onSend callback with the trimmed input value.
Reset the textarea height to auto and then set it to the minimum of scroll height or 150 pixels.
IF the pressed key is Enter and shift key is not pressed, prevent the default behavior.
Trigger the handleSend function to process the message.
Update the local input state with the new value from the textarea.
Reset the textarea height to auto to allow recalculation.
Set the textarea height to the minimum of its scroll height or 150 pixels.
Call the onClear callback to notify parent component of the clear action.
